source.extraction_note: Extracted facts/tables only; full HTML not committed.

article_summary.lore_context: A behemoth said to stride the ocean floor and tear vessels apart, wearing the prow of a ship as a pauldron/trophy.
article_summary.encounter_shape: Single-target fight with light to moderate movement and possible spiky party-wide damage.

encounter_journal.overview: King Deepbeard uses avoidable abilities. Normally avoid damage, but if affected by Gaseous Bubbles, seek damaging effects to break the bubble before Gaseous Explosion.

damage_dealers: Move to avoid Aftershock after Quake.
healers: Avoid damage during Call the Seas.
Move to avoid Aftershock after Quake.
tanks: Move to avoid Aftershock after Quake.
Move away from Ground Slam impact.

abilities.name: Gaseous Bubbles
abilities.description: The Gaseous Bubble absorbs 99062 damage, but causes a Gaseous Explosion if the bubble is not depleted after 20 sec.

abilities.name: Gaseous Explosion
abilities.description: The erupting Gaseous Bubble inflicts 142366 Frost damage to all nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Call the Seas
abilities.description: King Deepbeard calls the seas to his aid! Call the Seas inflicts 2 Frost damage every 0.3 sec.

abilities.name: Ground Slam
abilities.description: Inflicts 424796 Physical damage to enemies within 15 yards of the impact location, ignoring armor.

abilities.name: Ground Slam
abilities.description: Inflicts 424796 Physical damage to enemies within 15 yards of the impact location, ignoring armor.

abilities.name: Quake
abilities.description: King Deepbeard causes a Quake that inflicts 20 Physical damage to enemies and their allies within 5 yards. On Mythic difficulty, Quake causes Aftershock after 4 sec.

abilities.name: Aftershock
abilities.description: Inflicts 142366 Physical damage to enemies within 5 yards of the target.

abilities.name: Frenzy
abilities.description: Prince Oceanus goes into a frenzy, increasing his attack speed by 100%.

abilities.name: Necrotic Wound
abilities.description: Consumes the target with creeping decay, inflicting 854 Physical damage every 2 sec, and reducing healing and absorption received by 2%, for 5 sec. Stacks.

drops_summary.normalization_warning: Wowhead boss-page drops include boss-specific rows, zone drops, currency, holiday/timewalking/global rows, relics and other non-upgrade rows. Do not treat every row as a clean boss gear drop until normalized.

comments_curated_notes: Comments are mostly lore/joke/voice/holiday notes, with limited route-strategy value.
One comment speculates King Deepbeard's son is likely Prince Oceanus.
One comment notes Finely-Tailored Green Holiday Hat can drop during holiday/Legion Remix context; keep separate from normal dungeon gear drops.
next_processing_notes: Create a normalized boss object later from this extracted source.

Use compact CSV for full drop-table inspection.
